assertions.assertion: An authorization policy named 'admin' is defined using RequireRole("admin")
assertions.rationale: RequireRole is standard ASP.NET Core authorization

assertions.assertion: app.MapGroup("/admin") is used to group the admin endpoints
assertions.rationale: MapGroup is a well-known minimal API pattern

assertions.assertion: .RequireAuthorization("admin") or equivalent is applied to the group
assertions.rationale: Applying authorization to groups is documented

assertions.assertion: The individual admin endpoints are registered on the group rather than on app directly
